data.raceComments: {"comment":"The South Pacific Classic for 3-year-olds is run over 1400m for 200K, and 4. REGAL AWARD will be a lot sharper second up from a spell after racing greenly at Rosehill 3 weeks ago in his first start racing in a clockwise direction. He is nicely placed with 2kg less to carry, and an extra 200m is what he is looking for now. Stick with him on top. 8. MARETH was beaten but not too far off the placings in the Darby Munro Stakes at Rosehill 3 weeks ago, and she can settle closer from a superior gate here. Include. 1. BESKAR showed a terrific turn of foot when causing a major upset in the Darby Munro Stakes at Rosehill 3 weeks ago. He has a better draw this time, and he can repeat the dose, just don't expect another fancy price. 15. SIRAGUSA has won both of his starts to date in far weaker company, but he has done it in style. He is down in weight with Willo aboard. Include to be safe.","runners":[4,8,1,15],"exclusive":true}
